CellGraphR 0.99.0
  • Reference
    • Visualizing Cell Spatial Graphs
    • Analyzing Cell Graphs with igraph
    • Multi-modal Analysis: Cell-Graph Features with Genomic and Clinical Data
    • EDA: Graph-based Features from Spatial Cell Data

Package index

Import Graph Data

Functions for reading graph files and features

importGraphH5()
Import cell-graph topology from a PyTables HDF5 file
importAllGraphH5()
Batch import of cell-graph topology files
importGraphFeatures()
Import patient-level graph features as a SummarizedExperiment
addGraphToMAE()
Add graph features to a MultiAssayExperiment

Compute Graph Features

Topology and spectral graph metrics

extract_graph_features()
Extract graph-based tissue organization features
extract_advanced_spatial_features()
Extract advanced spatial relationship features
compute_assortativity()
Compute type assortativity (homophily)
compute_average_path_length()
Compute average shortest path length (Floyd-Warshall)
compute_motif_counts()
Count graph motifs (triangles, 3-stars, open 3-paths)
compute_mst_features()
Compute minimum spanning tree features
compute_mst_diameter()
Compute MST diameter via double-DFS
compute_multiscale_analysis()
Compute multi-scale local density and diversity
compute_spectral_features()
Compute graph spectral features from Laplacian eigenvalues
compute_transitivity()
Compute global transitivity (clustering coefficient)

Spatial Features

Spatial statistics derived from cell coordinates

compute_neighborhood_features()
Compute k-NN neighbourhood homogeneity and diversity
compute_nearest_neighbor_analysis()
Compute comprehensive nearest-neighbor statistics
compute_spatial_autocorrelation()
Compute spatial autocorrelation via Moran's I
compute_spatial_clustering()
Compute Hopkins statistic for spatial clustering tendency
compute_ripley_k_analysis()
Compute Ripley's K and L function statistics

Graph Construction

Build spatial graphs from coordinates

buildSpatialGraph()
Build a spatial igraph from a nuclei list
compute_delaunay_graph()
Compute Delaunay triangulation graph features
compute_gabriel_graph()
Compute Gabriel graph features
compute_knn_graph()
Compute k-nearest-neighbor graph features
compute_relative_neighborhood_graph()
Compute relative neighborhood graph features

Visualization

Plot spatial graphs and overlays

plotGraph()
Visualize a cell spatial graph

Statistical Testing

Association tests with clinical and factor outcomes

testFactorAssociations()
Test factor associations with sample groups

On this page

Developed by Sehyun Oh.
